summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard without inventing a shared canonical. No close, merge, fix, or PR-opening actions are allowed by this job. Proof-needed PRs stay open, maintainer-ready PRs are routed to target-specific human review, closed context stays historical, and the exact security-sensitive linked PR is quarantined only for central security handling.
